target_keywords.keyword:
Launch a seasonal menu campaign for Brewed Awakening, 
a specialty coffee shop in Mumbai, to increase 
walk-in customers and online orders for our new 
winter drinks collection featuring hand-crafted 
hazelnut lattes, spiced chai cold brew, and 
dark chocolate mocha strategy
Coffee lovers aged 20-35 in Mumbai, working  professionals in BKC and Lower Parel, college  students near campuses, people who treat coffee  as a daily ritual not just a caffeine fix tool

Brewed Awakening is a specialty coffee shop in 
Mumbai serving hand-crafted beverages made from 
single-origin beans sourced directly from Coorg 
and Chikmagalur farms. Our new winter seasonal 
menu launches this week featuring 6 new drinks 
including hazelnut latte, spiced chai cold brew, 
dark chocolate mocha, and a signature Mumbai 
cutting chai fusion. All drinks are available 
for dine-in, takeaway, and delivery via Zomato 
and Swiggy. platform
